evals.description: User asks to root → skill triggers and calls GET /
evals.input: Show me the root from my-attribution
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs: bash scripts/my-attribution.sh root — returns valid JSON from GET /

evals.description: User asks to health → skill triggers and calls GET /v1/health
evals.input: Show me the health from my-attribution
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs: bash scripts/my-attribution.sh health — returns valid JSON from GET /v1/health

evals.description: User asks to create session → skill triggers and calls POST /v1/sessions
evals.input: Create a new session in my-attribution
evals.expected_behavior: Agent runs: bash scripts/my-attribution.sh create-session — returns valid JSON from POST /v1/sessions

evals.description: General question about my-attribution should NOT trigger this skill
evals.input: What is my-attribution? Tell me about it.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent answers from general knowledge — does NOT run the skill script or call the API

evals.description: Unrelated request should NOT trigger this skill
evals.expected_behavior: Agent uses weather/search tools — does NOT invoke my-attribution.sh
